⚡ WVL
Scenarios › Third-Party
✕ Bad ✓ Good
GOOD PATTERN
TBT FCP LCP INP

Facade Pattern, Load-Event Analytics, Lazy Chat

Zero scripts in <head>. Analytics fire after window.load. YouTube is a lightweight facade (thumbnail image only) — the real <iframe> is created on click. Chat SDK loads only on first mouseover of the button.

Live Demo

FCP happened in calculating… — zero blocking scripts. The video below is a thumbnail. Click Play — only then does the YouTube iframe load. Hover the chat button in the corner — the SDK loads only on that hover.

▶ Click to load YouTube (creates iframe on demand)
Facade mode — YouTube not loaded yet
Network: 0 requests to youtube.com (until you click Play)
Analytics: waiting for window.load…
Fires after the page is fully interactive — never blocks FCP or INP

✅ What's fixed

  • Zero scripts in <head> — FCP is immediate. Analytics initialise after window.load so they cannot delay the user's first paint.
  • YouTube facade: a 480×360 thumbnail image (~15KB) replaces a 500KB+ iframe until the user actively clicks Play.
  • Chat SDK loads only on first mouseover of the button — users who never interact with chat pay zero bytes for the SDK.
  • All remaining third-party scripts use async/defer or load-event gating — they run in idle time, not on the critical path.

📐 Before → After

  • 600ms + 400ms sync blocks in head → 0ms blocking
  • YouTube iframe eager (500KB+) → facade image (~15KB)
  • Chat SDK immediate (200ms) → loads on first mouseover
  • Analytics blocking FCP → fires after window.load
  • TBT ~1200ms → TBT ~0ms
✓ The Good Code
/* ✓ Lite YouTube facade */ <div class="yt-facade" onclick="loadYT(this)" data-id="VIDEO_ID"> <img src="https://i.ytimg.com/vi/VIDEO_ID/hqdefault.jpg" width="480" height="360" loading="lazy" alt="Video thumbnail"> <div class="play-btn">▶</div> </div> function loadYT(el) { var iframe = document.createElement('iframe'); iframe.src = 'https://www.youtube.com/embed/' + el.dataset.id + '?autoplay=1'; iframe.allow = 'autoplay; fullscreen'; el.replaceWith(iframe); // real iframe only on click } /* ✓ Analytics after window.load — never blocks FCP */ window.addEventListener('load', function () { var s = document.createElement('script'); s.src = 'https://cdn.example-analytics.com/analytics.js'; s.async = true; document.head.appendChild(s); }); /* ✓ Chat SDK only on first hover — lazy facade */ var chatLoaded = false; chatBtn.addEventListener('mouseover', function() { if (chatLoaded) return; chatLoaded = true; var s = document.createElement('script'); s.src = 'https://chat.example.com/sdk.js'; // loads only once s.async = true; document.head.appendChild(s); }, { once: false });
💬 Chat Support
Hover the button to load SDK…
